title: Scented Glass Aqua Marine Bell Jar Natural Candle with Bell Cloche Lid
features: Enjoy the crisp, clean, and soothing aroma of the sea breeze with this Aqua Marine scented candle, evoking a relaxing coastal atmosphere.
Housed in a premium glass bell jar with a cloche lid that preserves fragrance and doubles as a beautiful decorative piece.
These luxurious candles come beautifully gift boxed.
Crafted using natural wax for a clean, even burn that enhances your space with long-lasting fragrance.
Dimensions:- Height-11.5cm x Width-8.5cm x Length-8.5cm
description: Aqua Marine Scented Candle in a Glass Bell Jar. The fresh and aquatic fragrance captures the gentle scent of ocean air and sea mist, creating a serene and revitalising ambience. Encased in a stylish clear glass jar with a cloche lid, this candle is as beautiful as it is functional — perfect for adding a touch of calm and sophistication to your décor.
